query:
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM installments GROUP BY section;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM installments WHERE section='ff365';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM installments GROUP BY section;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM installments WHERE section='ff365';
